nasb.text: Eleazar died and had no sons, but daughters only, so their brothers, the sons of Kish, took them as wives.

esv.text: Eleazar died having no sons, but only daughters; their kinsmen, the sons of Kish, married them.

cnv.text: 以利亞撒死了，沒有兒子，只有女兒；基士的兒子們，就是他們的親族，娶了她們為妻。

ccb.text: 以利亚撒终生没有儿子，只有女儿，同族人基士的儿子娶了她们为妻。
